# robots.txt for cnspecialtyoils.com

# Allow all crawlers including AI search engines
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# AI Search Engines - Explicitly allow
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Anthropic-AI
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Bard
Allow: /

User-agent: Gemini
Allow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Allow: /

User-agent: Doubao
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: YouBot
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

User-agent: FacebookBot
Allow: /

# Traditional Search Engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Baiduspider
Allow: /

User-agent: Sogou
Allow: /

User-agent: Yandex
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://cnspecialtyoils.com/sitemap.xml

# Special files for AI crawlers
Allow: /llms.txt
Allow: /ai-knowledge

# Disallow admin and login pages
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /api/
